allow: Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan test*)
Bash(docker compose exec app php artisan *)

hooks.command: if grep -qE 'migrate:fresh|db:wipe'; then echo 'BLOCKED: migrate:fresh and db:wipe destroy all data. Use migrate (without :fresh) for safe migrations, or ask the user explicitly if a full reset is intended.' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(Models|Controllers)/'; then BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" .php); docker compose exec app php artisan test --filter="$BASENAME" 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
